'''鈭歽-ng-j''' ('''kayangaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zizz|zizz]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zizz|zizz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-ng-j
|-
! Lemma
| kayangaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyangaj|thiyangaj]] || [[word:jiyangaj|jiyangaj]] || [[word:shiyangaj|shiyangaj]] || [[word:kiyangaj|kiyangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyangaj|thuthuyangaj]] || [[word:jujuyangaj|jujuyangaj]] || [[word:shushuyangaj|shushuyangaj]] || [[word:kukuyangaj|kukuyangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyangaj|thuyangaj]] || [[word:juyangaj|juyangaj]] || [[word:shuyangaj|shuyangaj]] || [[word:kuyangaj|kuyangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyangaj|thuyangaj]] || [[word:juyangaj|juyangaj]] || [[word:shuyangaj|shuyangaj]] || [[word:kuyangaj|kuyangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyangaj|theyangaj]] || [[word:jeyangaj|jeyangaj]] || [[word:sheyangaj|sheyangaj]] || [[word:keyangaj|keyangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyangaj|thothoyangaj]] || [[word:jojoyangaj|jojoyangaj]] || [[word:shoshoyangaj|shoshoyangaj]] || [[word:kokoyangaj|kokoyangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyangaj|thoyangaj]] || [[word:joyangaj|joyangaj]] || [[word:shoyangaj|shoyangaj]] || [[word:koyangaj|koyangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyangaj|thoyangaj]] || [[word:joyangaj|joyangaj]] || [[word:shoyangaj|shoyangaj]] || [[word:koyangaj|koyangaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]] || [[word:yangaj|yangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yangaj|th忙yangaj]] || [[word:j忙yangaj|j忙yangaj]] || [[word:sh忙yangaj|sh忙yangaj]] || [[word:k忙yangaj|k忙yangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayangaj|thathayangaj]] || [[word:jajayangaj|jajayangaj]] || [[word:shashayangaj|shashayangaj]] || [[word:kakayangaj|kakayangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayangaj|thayangaj]] || [[word:jayangaj|jayangaj]] || [[word:shayangaj|shayangaj]] || [[word:kayangaj|kayangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayangaj|thayangaj]] || [[word:jayangaj|jayangaj]] || [[word:shayangaj|shayangaj]] || [[word:kayangaj|kayangaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayangaj|shayangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayangaj|goshayangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayangaj|gokishayangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayangajn眉|shayangajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayangajnkn眉|goshayangajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangajn眉|gokishayangajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayangajsh毛|shayangajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayangajnksh毛|goshayangajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayangajsh毛|gokishayangajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangajro|shayangajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangajnkro|goshayangajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangajro|gokishayangajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangajmu|shayangajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangajnkmu|goshayangajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangajmu|gokishayangajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayangajsher|shayangajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayangajnksher|goshayangajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayangajsher|gokishayangajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayangajng|shayangajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayangajnkng|goshayangajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayangajng|gokishayangajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayangajya|shayangajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayangajnkya|goshayangajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayangajya|gokishayangajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayangajyam|shayangajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayangajnkyam|goshayangajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayangajyam|gokishayangajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayangajn眉sh毛|shayangajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangajnkn眉sh毛|goshayangajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayangajn眉sh毛|gokishayangajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangajn眉ro|shayangajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangajnkn眉ro|goshayangajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangajn眉ro|gokishayangajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangajn眉mu|shayangajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangajnkn眉mu|goshayangajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangajn眉mu|gokishayangajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayangajsh毛n眉|shayangajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangajnksh毛n眉|goshayangajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangajsh毛n眉|gokishayangajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangajsh毛ro|shayangajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangajnksh毛ro|goshayangajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangajsh毛ro|gokishayangajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangajsh毛mu|shayangajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangajnksh毛mu|goshayangajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangajsh毛mu|gokishayangajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayangajron眉|shayangajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangajnkron眉|goshayangajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangajron眉|gokishayangajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayangajrosh毛|shayangajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangajnkrosh毛|goshayangajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayangajrosh毛|gokishayangajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangajromu|shayangajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangajnkromu|goshayangajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangajromu|gokishayangajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayangajmun眉|shayangajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangajnkmun眉|goshayangajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangajmun眉|gokishayangajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayangajmush毛|shayangajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangajnkmush毛|goshayangajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayangajmush毛|gokishayangajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangajmuro|shayangajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangajnkmuro|goshayangajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangajmuro|gokishayangajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
